language.close_accessibility: Khui ebe ne a gha rhie ẹde

welcome.name_prompt: Ama a i ghi re enni ẹre.

phone.headline: De nọmba ẹrọ ẹre?
phone.body: A ma ya tiẹ kodu. Ẹghẹ eve ne ọ gha gbe.
phone.verified_body: A ya kpa nọmba ẹre. Emwi ọkpa ọ ghi khin.
phone.consent_text: I mwẹ ne a gha ya tiẹ ẹmwẹ ne ọ rre Mingla vbe SMS ne ọ khin kiran, ne ọ khin kodu, itiẹ ọre, ne ọ khin emwi ne ọ gha do ọ ya. Zaghachi STOP ne u gha do ne ọ khin HELP ne ọ gha mwẹ ẹmwẹ. Ghee
phone.consent_accessibility: Mwẹ ne a gha ya tiẹ ẹmwẹ ne ọ rre Mingla
phone.country_accessibility: Ẹvbo ne a rhie: {{name}}. Kẹ ne u gha rhan.

otp.headline: De kodu na
otp.channel_label: I mwẹ ẹre? Gberra ọda nọhọ:
otp.error_max_attempts: Igberra ẹha, ọ i ru ẹre. Gberra ọda nọhọ vbe ebe na.
otp.error_wrong_code: Kodu na i sẹ. Ke gberra.
otp.otp_accessibility: Kodu ne a gha kpa ẹghẹ ọkpa

gender.headline: Kẹ ma ghẹ emwi ne ọ gha gbe ọ.
gender.body: Ne a gha mwẹ emwi ne ọ sẹ ẹre.

details.headline: Ọ fẹ khin.
details.body: Emwi ne ọ bẹ ghe. A ma kpaọ iye ne ọ khin.
details.country_helper: Ọ ya rhan igho ne ọ khin ebe ne a gha kẹ
details.dob_placeholder: De ẹghẹ ne a bie ọ?

value_prop.beat1_headline: Re ghẹ ehe ne u gha rrie.

intents.headline: Nẹ ne ebe ne ọ sẹ.
intents.body: Kẹ emwi ne ọ sẹ ọ hia.
intents.caption: Rhie emwen ne ọ ghà bẹ ghẹ re.
intents.adventurous_desc: Wa emwi ne a i re tẹ gha mwẹ
intents.first_date_desc: Mu ọse ni bẹ ghe sẹ
intents.group_fun: Ẹghẹ Nọ Sẹ Vbe Igho Ẹvbo
intents.group_fun_desc: Ẹvbo ne ọ bu ne ọ sẹ
intents.picnic_dates_desc: Ovẹn, evbare, ẹghẹ ne ọ sẹ
intents.take_a_stroll_desc: Se ọda ne u mwẹ ẹtan

location.settings_body:
A ya khui ehe ne u re ne Mingla.
Ruẹ ẹre vbe Ehe Ne A Rhan ne a gha mwẹ
ehe ne ọ sẹ gbẹra vbe iyeke ẹre.
location.retry_turned_on: I ya ruẹ ẹre — ke gberra
location.error_headline: I gha mwẹ ehe ne u re
location.error_body:
Signal i sẹ ne ọ khin GPS ọ ghi re gbe.
Ke gberra ne ọ khin de eni ẹvbo ẹre.
location.idle_headline: Ehe ne ọ sẹ bẹ ghe vbe iha
location.idle_body:
Ruẹ GPS ne a gha mwẹ
ehe ne ọ sẹ vbe iyeke ẹre.
location.privacy_hint: Ehe ne u re, ọ vbe ẹhẹn. Ẹghẹ hia.

celebration.headline: Kẹ ghee.
celebration.body: Irhie ẹnẹ ne u gha gbe u ya khin.

manual_location.headline: Fie pin ẹre vbe map
manual_location.body: Rhie adrẹsi ẹre ne ọ sẹ — rrie vbe ẹda — a ma ya ruẹ ehe ne ọ sẹ gbẹra vbe iyeke ẹre.
manual_location.no_results: Hmm, a i mwẹ ẹre. Gberra ẹda ne ọ khin ẹvbo ne ọ vbe iyeke.
manual_location.helper: Ne ọ sẹ, ne emwi ne a gha kẹ ma gha sẹ.
manual_location.privacy: Ehe ne u re ne ọ sẹ, ọ vbe ẹhẹn avbe ma. Ẹghẹ hia.

categories.headline: De ẹkpa ehe ne u hẹnmwẹ?
categories.body: Rhie emwen ne ọ ghà ghẹ nọ re.

budget.headline: Ehe ne ọ sẹ ẹre
budget.body: Rhie igho ne ọ sẹ ẹre.
budget.caption: Emwi ne i gha kha ẹghẹ hia ọ gha rre.

transport.headline: De vbe u ya se ọda?
transport.body: Ọ ya mwẹ ma ghẹ ẹghẹ irrie.

travel_time.headline: De ne u gha rrie?
travel_time.body: Rhan ehe ne u re tẹ.
travel_time.caption: Rrie ẹghẹ {{minutes}} vbe {{mode}}
travel_time.error: I gha sẹ emwi ne u rhie. Kẹ Ke gberra.

friends.headline: Ẹvbo ne ọ vbe iyeke ẹre
friends.body: Fie ẹvbo ne ọ vbe iyeke ẹre, ke haɗa. Uwa ma gha mwẹ emwi ne uwa gha ru uwa, ghee emwi ne iran hẹnmwẹ, ya rhan emwi ne ọ sẹ uwa.
friends.pair_queued_hint: Ọ ma gha ru ẹre ne iran gha bẹghe
friends.empty_state: Ọre i re iha. Fie ẹvbo ne u gha ru emwi ne ọ sẹ ya.
friends.pair_wants: Ọ hẹnmwẹ ne ọ gha haɗa ne ọ
friends.pair_curated: Ghee emwi ne a rhie ne uwa eve.
friends.alert_self_message: U i gha fie ọ khin ọre.
friends.alert_duplicate_message: Ọghe na te vbe ebe ẹre.
friends.alert_accept_error: I gha mwẹ ẹmwẹ ihaɗa. Ke gberra.
friends.alert_decline_error: I gha giẹ ẹmwẹ ihaɗa. Ke gberra.
friends.alert_generic_error: I gha ru ẹmwẹ na. Ke gberra.
friends.share_message: Ọbọ! Bẹghe Mingla ne awa gha mwẹ emwi ne ọ sẹ uwa. https://usemingla.com

collaborations.headline: Rhan emwi uwa
collaborations.body: Bẹ ghe ẹghẹ ne ẹvbo ẹre. Mwẹ emwi ne uwa gha ru, kẹ ne emwi ne uwa hẹnmwẹ, ya mu ẹre sẹ.
collaborations.session_name_placeholder: vbe ẹtan irrie ẹdẹ ọghe, emwi ne a gha ru ason...
collaborations.name_taken_error: A te ya eni na. Ru ọnọhọ!
collaborations.generic_error: Hmm, ọ i ru ẹre. Ke gberra.
collaborations.empty_state: Fie ọre sẹ — ke u gha rhan emwi uwa.

consent.headline: Emwi ọkpa nẹ nẹ
consent.body: Mingla ya ru ẹre ne emwi ne u rhie — aro ẹre, ọse ẹre, ehe ne u re — ne ọ gha mwẹ emwi ne u gha hẹnmwẹ gbẹra. Emwi ẹre khin ẹre uwẹ. A i ya hia ẹre, u gha rhan ẹre kua ẹghẹ ne u hẹnmwẹ.

getting_experiences.loading_1: A ya ghee ehe ne ọ vbe iyeke...
getting_experiences.loading_2: A ya mu emwi ne u rhie sẹ...
getting_experiences.loading_3: A ya wa ehe ne ọ sẹ gbẹra...
